sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 12

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 12:1
items.html:
(to the question) Bi'ah Shniya [second coming]
The second coming is the discernment of the second Zivug [coupling], made upon the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] when they come with their upper one to the upper one's place. From this Zivug the MAN receive the form of their Ibur [conception]. See Answer 11 (p. 744, Item 13).
